name: Sidebar navigation reaches all major pages without errors
description: After login, clicking each sidebar link navigates to the correct page without errors or blank screens.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Feynman Mode link in the sidebar
Verify the Feynman Mode page loads with a topic selector or empty state message visible
Click the Study Planner link in the sidebar
Verify the planner page loads showing a weekly calendar grid with day columns
